rationale: Broad CI/CD refactor PR that delivers the multi-faceted changes the body enumerates. New .github/scripts/module-map.sh and .github/actions/setup-validadores/action.yml centralize per-module shell logic and Python setup (the same module-map.sh design later isolated into PR #3). Workflow files implement the documented fixes: ci-global.yml converts `find | while` to process substitution so EXIT propagates correctly, and excludes .pre-commit-config.yaml from yamllint. pr-guardian.yml moves PR_TITLE into env to prevent injection and adds CHANGELOG.md to a protected list with an HAS_MODULE_CHANGES exception. validar-todos.yml restores --strict and switches jq to -sc for single-line JSON. security-scan.yml drops fetch-depth: 0 from detect-secrets (and pins trufflehog). New .github/workflows/release.yml automates semver tag releases extracting notes from CHANGELOG via awk, and new link-check.yml schedules weekly lychee runs. Issue templates have indentation fixed (root-level keys de-indented) and the v1.0.0 example wrapped in quotes to disambiguate YAML. Validador scripts (validar_agente.py, validar_hook.py, validar_modulo.py, validar_proyecto.py, validar_repositorio.py) get ruff lint fixes. New ruff.toml, requirements.txt, and README placeholders for new module subdirs. Substantive multi-domain refactor with honest scope disclosure in the body, including the explicit `continue-on-error: true` for advisory checks.
